title: lftp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.9.2-7]
- Do not wait for server close-notify on TLS close
- Resolves: RHEL-100406

[4.9.2-6]
- Improve fix for close of TLS connection
- Resolves: RHEL-90997

[4.9.2-5]
- Ensure proper closing of TLS connection
- Resolves: RHEL-90997
full_text:
[4.9.2-7]
- Do not wait for server close-notify on TLS close
- Resolves: RHEL-100406

[4.9.2-6]
- Improve fix for close of TLS connection
- Resolves: RHEL-90997

[4.9.2-5]
- Ensure proper closing of TLS connection
- Resolves: RHEL-90997
